VAULTWARDEN_DOMAIN.description: Public URL where Vaultwarden will be reachable, e.g. https://vault.example.com. Auto-derived from VAULTWARDEN_SUBDOMAIN + PUBLIC_DOMAIN at install time — leave blank unless you want to override.

VAULTWARDEN_SIGNUPS.description: Allow new users to create accounts on the Vaultwarden web UI directly. Leave 'true' on first install so you can register your own account; flip to 'false' afterwards to lock the family-only vault down.

VAULTWARDEN_SSO_ENABLED.description: Enable Vaultwarden ↔ Authelia SSO. On by default so family members log in once and have access to every service. Flip to false if you hit Vaultwarden SSO regressions and need to fall back to local accounts.

VAULTWARDEN_SSO_SECRET.description: OIDC client secret for Vaultwarden ↔ Authelia. Auto-generated; the wizard wires it into both the SSO_CLIENT_SECRET env and Authelia's clients[] entry.

PUBLIC_DOMAIN.description: Public domain (used to build the SSO authority URL https://auth.<domain>)
